ogTitle: Bulloo Downs vs Bullyard: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bulloo Downs and Bullyard.
heading: Bulloo Downs vs Bullyard — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bulloo Downs, Queensland and Bullyard, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bullyard has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bulloo Downs (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bulloo Downs or Bullyard safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bulloo Downs has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Bullyard scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bulloo Downs scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Bullyard scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bulloo Downs or Bullyard?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bullyard has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
